title: Mellow Smoked Ukrainian Cherry Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Ukrainian stew featuring cherries and a hint of smoke, made in a donabe vessel and suitable for paleo diets. This dish is perfect for a cozy evening meal.
instructions: Preheat the donabe vessel over medium heat.
Add the diced smoked pork and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cherries, beef broth, apple cider vinegar, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper to the donabe vessel.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Use two forks to shred the smoked pork into bite-sized pieces.
Continue to simmer the stew for an additional 10 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together and the cherries are tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
